name: Overpass API
description: Query OpenStreetMap data with powerful geographic queries — find any place, building, or route on Earth.
longDescription: Overpass API is a read-only API for accessing OpenStreetMap (OSM) data. It allows you to query any geographic data in the OSM database using Overpass Query Language (OverpassQL). You can find any node (point), way (line/polygon), or relation by type, name, tag, or bounding box. Typical use cases include finding all restaurants in a city, POI lookups, routing data, and geographic research.
pricing: Free public instance; self-hostable for heavy use
affiliateText: Building a map app? Combine with Mapbox or Leaflet.js — deploy on Vercel.
